items.title: RPS presented as +1.3% skill when CI overlaps null
items.evidence: L123: 'RPS skill +1.3%' but bootstrap CI includes null
items.mechanism: Inflated skill claim could trigger reviewer rejection of scoring rule section
items.fix_hint: Reframe as '2 of 3 scoring rules positive; RPS skill not distinguishable from null'
items.mcc_rationale: S57, S49_nivel2, Auditoria_Q1_S50 logged but snippets empty. Missing explicit CI-null overlap sentence + Q1 cite for L123 RPS claim.

items.title: BSS CI is percentile, not BCa
items.evidence: T_BLINDAJE_BSS_CI_S57.csv uses boot percentile instead of BCa
items.mechanism: Inconsistency with PR-AUC (which uses BCa) -> reviewer flag
items.fix_hint: Re-run with boot::boot.ci(type='bca'); addendum v1.3
items.mcc_rationale: S57 + Auditoria_Q1_S50 + audit_findings logged, snippets empty. Missing Q1 cite distinguishing percentile vs BCa for BSS CI.

items.title: Ortiz 2004 cited as source for 3-5x national incidence ratio
items.evidence: L45 cites Ortiz 2004 but Ortiz reports rodent seroprevalence VIII Region, not national HCPS incidence
items.mechanism: Factual misattribution -> reviewer flags as data fabrication
items.fix_hint: Replace with MINSAL Bulletin + direct calculation
items.mcc_rationale: S57_completa_contextualizada, S55_sesgos_56, S37, 04_sesgos_vacios logged, snippets empty. Missing explicit manuscript phrase correcting Ortiz 2004 scope.

items.title: DAG: FSI_R5 (exposure) lacks direct arrow to SCPH_cases
items.evidence: R1_DAG_dagitty.txt has FSI_R5 without -> SCPH_cases edge; adjustment set becomes formally incorrect
items.mechanism: Legacy S37 issue; reviewer with DAG expertise will catch it
items.fix_hint: Add arrow + supplementary note explaining semantics
items.mcc_rationale: audit_findings, S57_biblio, S52, RedTeam, Auditoria_Q1_S50 logged, snippets empty. Missing DAG-correction calculation + Q1 DAG methods cite.

items.title: Case definition drift MINSAL 2002-2024 (IgM pre-2012 vs RT-PCR post-2012)
items.evidence: Case definition changed when RT-PCR became standard
items.mechanism: Differential sensitivity over time -> spurious temporal trend
items.fix_hint: Sensitivity analysis restricting to 2012+, report delta
items.mcc_rationale: audit_findings, S57_biblio, S52, RedTeam logged, snippets empty. Missing Q1 MINSAL 2012 RT-PCR policy cite + manuscript phrase acknowledging drift.

items.title: Winner's curse lag 5 + biological confusion 18-24m vs 5m
items.evidence: Lag 5 chosen from scan of multiple lags
items.mechanism: Post-hoc lag selection inflates effect size
items.fix_hint: Document pre-specification lineage; report all lags' IRR for transparency
items.mcc_rationale: project_S55_sesgos_56_completos + 04_sesgos_vacios logged, snippets empty. Missing FDR-adjusted p-value calculation for lag-scan winner's curse.

items.title: FSI compound formula (NDMI+NDVI+NBR2) weights undocumented
items.evidence: FSI computation script does not cite a formal paper for the weighting
items.mechanism: Custom index without precedent -> reviewer suspicion of tuning
items.fix_hint: Cite Bortman 1999 or provide sensitivity analysis with alternative weights
items.mcc_rationale: S37 logged, snippet empty. Missing Q1 remote-sensing cite justifying NDMI+NDVI+NBR2 weights for FSI compound index.

items.title: SEREMI Maule pre-2018 (Nuble split from Maule)

items.fix_hint: Describe back-allocation procedure explicitly in methods
items.mcc_rationale: S50 + 04_sesgos_vacios logged, snippets empty. Missing manuscript phrase clarifying pre-2018 Maule aggregation for Nuble cases.

items.title: theta not propagated in bootstrap BSS
items.evidence: Bootstrap holds theta fixed -> CI underestimates uncertainty
items.fix_hint: Parametric bootstrap refitting inside each iteration
items.mcc_rationale: Prior refs project_sesion_code_S57.md and Auditoria_Q1_S50_cierre.md have empty snippets. Theta bootstrap issue flagged but no Q1 citation or manuscript phrase.
